name: post-release-retrospective
description: SDLC retrospective phase: bundle the mission's intent drift history, heuristic feedback report, dissent log, and requirements/design artifacts under a single retrospective packet. Read-only summary — closes the intent loop's learn phase explicitly after a release.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type without roles.

params.cmd: if [ -f {{evidence_dir}}/intent-deltas.jsonl ]; then wc -l {{evidence_dir}}/intent-deltas.jsonl; else echo 'no intent-deltas.jsonl'; fi

printf '# Retrospective — %s

Generated: %s
Mission: %s

## Artifacts

- requirements-draft.json: %s
- design-spec.json: %s
- test-plan.json: %s
- task-plan.json: %s
- dissent-log.json: %s
- intent-snapshots.jsonl: %s
- intent-deltas.jsonl: %s
- heuristic-feedback-report.json: %s

## Intent Drift

See intent-deltas.jsonl for per-transition drift scores.

## Heuristic Feedback

See heuristic-feedback-report.json for validated intuition scores.

## Outstanding Dissent

See dissent-log.json for any surviving concerns raised during review cycles.
' '{{project_name}}' '{{run_utc_now}}' '{{mission_id}}' "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/requirements-draft.json && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/design-spec.json && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/test-plan.json && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/task-plan.json && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/dissent-log.json && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/intent-snapshots.jsonl && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/intent-deltas.jsonl && echo present || echo absent)" "$(test -f {{evidence_dir}}/heuristic-feedback-report.json && echo present || echo absent)" > {{retrospective_output}}
